text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out on a walk...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gahhh! Wait, come back! C'mon,<n>lemme pet
your gorgeous floof—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aw maaan... It's gone. Ugh, I'm<n>pooped from all
of that running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you there. Yeah, the person I'm<n>looking at
right now. I've got a<n>question for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Got any fail-safe plans on how I<n>can
manage to pet that cat just now?
choice_data_list: Just wait in a sunny spot.
Chasing it at full speed is sure to work!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Nothing beats lazing about in<n>the sun. So
you think I should just chill<n>and wait for it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Weeelp, guess I'll just... yawn...have a little... nap...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wake me up when the cat... comes...Zzzzz...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, I wait for the cat in Seiun<n>Sky's place
while she snoozes away.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's admirable how she's using<n>everything at
her disposal. Or so I<n>think in an attempt to
console myself<n>after being so easily
manipulated...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, nice idea! Well, get crackin',<n>then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Don't play dumb with me.<n>You're the one
who said chasing after<n>the cat'll work for sure,
so put your<n>money where your mouth is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
As for me, I'm gonna wholeheartedly<n>cheer you
on from the sidelines!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's right there in the shade of that<n>tree! You
can do it! Woo, go get 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The cat proves to be far more wily<n>than I
expected, and it seriously gives<n>me the
runaround.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm unable to capture it on my own,<n>so I end up
asking <chrname> for help...
